payload.name: capture
payload.description: Capture a task onto the board (starts in Now). Joins argv into the task text. Emits task.captured.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys, json
text = " ".join(sys.argv[1:]).strip() or "(empty task)"
print(json.dumps({"name": "task.captured", "payload": {"text": text}}))

payload.name: move
payload.description: Move a task to a lane (now|this_week|waiting|done; friendly spellings normalized). argv: id then lane. Emits task.moved.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys, json
args = sys.argv[1:]
task = args[0] if args else ""
lane = " ".join(args[1:]).strip().lower() or "now"
ALIAS = {"this week":"this_week","thisweek":"this_week","todo":"now","inbox":"now",
         "today":"now","complete":"done","completed":"done","finished":"done",
         "blocked":"waiting","later":"waiting"}
lane = ALIAS.get(lane, lane)
if lane not in ("now","this_week","waiting","done"): lane = "now"
try: task = int(task)
except (ValueError, TypeError): pass
print(json.dumps({"name": "task.moved", "payload": {"task": task, "lane": lane}}))

payload.name: edit
payload.description: Rename a task. argv: id then the new text (joined). Emits task.edited; the board shows the latest text.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# edit — rename a task. argv: task id then the new text (joined). Emits task.edited.
import sys, json
args = sys.argv[1:]
task = args[0] if args else ""
try: task = int(task)
except (ValueError, TypeError): pass
text = " ".join(args[1:]).strip() or "(empty task)"
print(json.dumps({"name": "task.edited", "payload": {"task": task, "text": text}}))

payload.name: drop
payload.description: Delete a task (tombstone; the log keeps history). argv[0] is the id. Emits task.dropped; the board hides it.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# drop — delete a task (a tombstone; the log keeps the history). argv[0] is the
# task id. Emits task.dropped; the board hides dropped tasks.
import sys, json
args = sys.argv[1:]
t = args[0] if args else ""
try: t = int(t)
except (ValueError, TypeError): pass
print(json.dumps({"name": "task.dropped", "payload": {"task": t}}))

payload.name: board
payload.description: Now/This week/Waiting/Done board. Folds task.captured/moved/edited/dropped. Each card has a rename (edit) form, move buttons (/run/move), and a delete button (/run/drop); a capture box at top (/run/capture). Bare semantic HTML, kernel class vocabulary.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3 # board — Now/This week/Waiting/Done, replayed from the log. Folds task.captured # (id = seq, starts Now), task.moved (lane), task.edited (text), task.dropped # (hide). Each card: rename (edit), move buttons, delete. Bare semantic HTML. import sys, json from html import escape LANES = [("now","Now"),("this_week","This week"),("waiting","Waiting"),("done","Done")] tasks, order = {}, [] for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip() if not line: continue try: e = json.loads(line) except Exception: continue n = e.get("name"); p = e.get("payload", {}) or {} if n == "task.captured": sid = e.get("seq") tasks[sid] = {"text": p.get("text",""), "lane": "now", "at": (e.get("occurred_at","") or "")[:16].replace("T"," "), "dropped": False} order.append(sid) elif n in ("task.moved","task.edited","task.dropped"): t = p.get("task") try: t = int(t) except (ValueError, TypeError): pass if t in tasks: if n == "task.moved": tasks[t]["lane"] = p.get("lane","now") elif n == "task.edited": tasks[t]["text"] = p.get("text", tasks[t]["text"]) elif n == "task.dropped": tasks[t]["dropped"] = True by_lane = {k: [] for k,_ in LANES} for sid in order: t = tasks[sid] if t["dropped"]: continue by_lane.get(t["lane"], by_lane["now"]).append((sid,t)) print("") print("board") print("

board

") print("
") active = sum(1 for sid in order if not tasks[sid]["dropped"] and tasks[sid]["lane"] != "done") print("

%d open · %d done

" % (active, len(by_lane["done"]))) for key,label in LANES: items = by_lane[key] print("

%s (%d)

" % (escape(label), len(items))) if not items: print("

—

"); continue for sid,t in items: print("
") print("
" "" "" "
" % (sid, escape(t["text"], quote=True))) print("
") for dk,dl in LANES: if dk == key: continue btn = "✓ Done" if dk == "done" else dl print("
" "" "" "
" % (sid, dk, escape(btn))) print("
" "" "
" % sid) print("
") print("
#%s · %s
" % (sid, escape(t["at"]))) print("
") print("")

examples.note: edit renames; drop hides and lowers the open count

payload.name: plan
payload.description: Set (or clear) a day's meal. argv: day (mon..sun, friendly spellings) then meal (joined; empty clears). Re-planning overwrites. Emits meal.planned.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# plan — set (or clear) a day's meal. argv: day (mon..sun, friendly spellings)
# then the meal (joined; empty clears the day). Re-planning overwrites. Emits meal.planned.
import sys, json
args = sys.argv[1:]
day = (args[0].lower() if args else "")
ALIAS = {"monday":"mon","tuesday":"tue","wednesday":"wed","thursday":"thu",
         "friday":"fri","saturday":"sat","sunday":"sun"}
day = ALIAS.get(day, day)
meal = " ".join(args[1:]).strip()
print(json.dumps({"name": "meal.planned", "payload": {"day": day, "meal": meal}}))

payload.name: shop
payload.description: Add an item to the shopping/prep list. Joins argv. Emits shopping.added (id = its seq).
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys, json
item = " ".join(sys.argv[1:]).strip() or "(item)"
print(json.dumps({"name": "shopping.added", "payload": {"item": item}}))

payload.name: got
payload.description: Check a shopping item off. argv[0] is the item id. Emits shopping.bought.

payload.name: unshop
payload.description: Remove a shopping item (mistake / no longer needed). argv[0] is the item id. Emits shopping.removed; the list hides it.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# unshop — remove a shopping item (a mistake / no longer needed). argv[0] is the
# item id (seq of its shopping.added). Emits shopping.removed; the list hides it.
import sys, json
args = sys.argv[1:]; t = args[0] if args else ""
try: t = int(t)
except (ValueError, TypeError): pass
print(json.dumps({"name": "shopping.removed", "payload": {"item": t}}))

payload.name: kitchen
payload.description: Meal plan + shopping/prep. Folds meal.planned (latest wins; empty clears), shopping.added/bought/removed. Per day: set + clear forms (/run/plan); per item: got it (/run/got) + remove (/run/unshop). Bare semantic HTML, kernel class vocabulary.
payload.implementation:
#!/usr/bin/env python3 # kitchen — meal plan + shopping/prep, replayed from the log. meal.planned (day, # meal; latest wins; empty meal clears the day), shopping.added (item, id=seq), # shopping.bought (id), shopping.removed (id; hide). Per day: set + clear forms; # per item: got it + remove. Bare semantic HTML, kernel class vocabulary. import sys, json from html import escape DAYS = [("mon","Mon"),("tue","Tue"),("wed","Wed"),("thu","Thu"),("fri","Fri"),("sat","Sat"),("sun","Sun")] week, shop, order, bought, removed = {}, {}, [], set(), set() for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip() if not line: continue try: e = json.loads(line) except Exception: continue n = e.get("name"); p = e.get("payload", {}) or {} if n == "meal.planned": week[p.get("day","")] = p.get("meal","") elif n == "shopping.added": sid = e.get("seq"); shop[sid] = p.get("item",""); order.append(sid) elif n in ("shopping.bought","shopping.removed"): it = p.get("item") try: it = int(it) except (ValueError, TypeError): pass (bought if n == "shopping.bought" else removed).add(it) print("") print("kitchen") print("

kitchen

") print("

This week

") print("") for key,label in DAYS: meal = week.get(key,"") cell = escape(meal) if meal else "—" setform = ("" "" "" "" % key) clearform = "" if meal: clearform = ("" "" "" % key) print("" % (escape(label), cell, setform, clearform)) print("
daymeal
%s%s
%s%s
") to_buy = [(sid, shop[sid]) for sid in order if sid not in bought and sid not in removed] got = [(sid, shop[sid]) for sid in order if sid in bought and sid not in removed] print("

Shopping list (%d to get)

" % len(to_buy)) print("
") if not to_buy: print("

nothing to buy

") for sid,item in to_buy: print("
%s" "
" "
" % (escape(item), sid, sid)) if got: print("

got

") for sid,item in got: print("
✓ %s
" % escape(item)) print("")

examples.note: clear empties a day; removed+bought leave nothing to get

#!/usr/bin/env python3
# plan — set (or clear) a day's meal. argv: day (mon..sun, friendly spellings)
# then the meal (joined; empty clears the day). Re-planning overwrites. Emits meal.planned.
import sys, json
args = sys.argv[1:]
day = (args[0].lower() if args else "")
ALIAS = {"monday":"mon","tuesday":"tue","wednesday":"wed","thursday":"thu",
         "friday":"fri","saturday":"sat","sunday":"sun"}
day = ALIAS.get(day, day)
meal = " ".join(args[1:]).strip()
print(json.dumps({"name": "meal.planned", "payload": {"day": day, "meal": meal}}))

payload.text: Capture a task above; rename me with save, ✕ to delete
Try the lane buttons to move me
